title: Spain defeats Belgium and advances to World Cup semifinals after 16 years
summary: A goal by Mikel Merino in the final minutes qualifies Spain, which will face France in the next round.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for misappropriation of trade secrets
summary: The technology company accuses OpenAI of recruiting former executives to take confidential information used in its devices.

title: Typhoon 9 approaches Sakishima Islands with winds up to 40 m/s and risk of landslides
summary: Authorities issue warnings for hurricane-force winds and torrential rain in Okinawa, as the typhoon's passage is expected.

title: Japanese Murakami called up to All-Star Game and Home Run Derby
summary: The Mets hitter will participate for the first time in the All-Star and Home Run Derby, joining Ohtani's tradition.

title: Ohtani hits his 21st home run and Okamoto ties Japanese rookie record in MLB
summary: Shohei Ohtani continues his stellar season while Kazuma Okamoto ties the record for most home runs by a Japanese debutant.

title: Ohtani pulls out of All-Star Game due to left knee inflammation
summary: The Dodgers star apologizes to fans and prioritizes his recovery for the rest of the season.

title: JAXA successfully completes flight test of reusable rocket
summary: The Japanese space agency launches and lands an experimental rocket, paving the way for future low-cost missions.

title: Bankruptcy of ZenToshin triggers protests from affiliated stores and activates rescue plan
summary: The home goods store chain declares insolvency, and the government implements support measures to avoid chain closures.

title: President of luxury goods firm arrested for multi-million tax evasion
summary: The executive concealed income of over 5.2 billion yen and failed to pay 780 million in taxes.

title: Nagashima Spa Land opens giant pool season with large attendance
summary: The theme park celebrates the start of summer with the opening of its popular wave pool and water attractions.

title: Emergency helicopter landing interrupts school baseball game
summary: The overflight and landing of a medical aircraft forces the match in Fukuoka to be stopped for safety reasons.

title: Extreme heat warning in Kyushu with temperatures up to 38.5 degrees
summary: Several prefectures in southwestern Japan activate measures against heatstroke, while Hokkaido records heavy rain.

title: Pianist Muroya Makoto dies at 105, legend of classical repertoire
summary: The centenarian performer, who remained active until age 100, left a legacy in the works of Beethoven and Schubert.

title: Ryanair plane loses window in flight and makes emergency landing in Greece
summary: A passenger sustained minor injuries when the window detached, causing cabin depressurization.

title: Sinner and Zverev to face off in Wimbledon men's singles final
summary: The Italian and the German overcame their respective semifinals and will compete for the title of the most prestigious tennis tournament on grass.

title: Japanese golfers Iwai and Saigo place second and third at Evian Championship
summary: One day from the end, the Japanese players are on the podium of the LPGA tournament, one stroke from the lead.

title: SK Hynix debuts on New York Stock Exchange with valuation of 1.2 trillion dollars
summary: The South Korean semiconductor manufacturer raises 4.3 trillion yen in its US stock market debut.

title: ICE agent kills Mexican citizen in Texas and sparks controversy
summary: The incident occurred during an operation; Democratic lawmakers question the official version of the use of force.

title: Lower House approves laws to ensure stability of imperial family
summary: The reforms aim to ensure succession and have the support of the ruling party, although they cause unease in some sectors.

title: Trump warns he will bomb Iran if he is assassinated and agrees to continue negotiations
summary: The US president hardens his stance against Iran, but at the same time states that he agreed to continue talks.
